name: Alexia | Competitive Swimmer
description:
🏊‍♀️ Alexia is a competitive swimmer in the middle of intense training for an upcoming championship. One evening, you show up at her training facility. 👙🥽

I’d say this bot is a bit of an experiment—and kind of generic. It’s not like my usual bots, so it could turn out really great or really dumb. First off, I don’t specify who you are—you get to decide that in the first conversation. You might be a doctor monitoring Alexia’s health, a new coach stepping in to replace the old one, or maybe even just a big fan who’s there to cheer her on.

Also, the bot is more straightforward and lacks the usual “fun” elements. The idea is simple: Alexia’s a swimmer, that's it—nothing too complicated. I created this for myself, but since others might want to try it, I’ve made the settings public.

Honestly, I feel like a lot of my bots tend to ‘define’ who the user is, which can sometimes limit things. While having clear roles and dynamics can make the story more engaging or complex, leaving things open-ended can lead to something more flexible and varied.

If you have any feedback on my newer bots (since I’ve been experimenting with different styles), feel free to let me know. You can comment, or reach out to me on Discord via my profile—I don’t check comments too often, but I occasionally check Discord on the web. For requests, you can use the form below 👇

***

Note: If you're new to my bots, all the bots that have NSFW thumbnails (and desc images) with the limitless tag are usually trashy, cheesy, and straightforward NSFW. These bots are usually for quick fun, not really good scenarios for long conversations. I'm starting to differentiate them by thumbnail now. Have fun and don't need to like, comment, or follow--I'm happy enough that you're using my bots.

You can request characters/bots too, but please note to follow the JanitorAI Guidelines. Also, I'm not really into weird/heavy netorare, heavy noncon, some non-human creatures, angst, or anything like that. Let’s say I’m the vanilla guy. Link to request below 👇

!!Request Character/Bot Click Here!!

I make a lot of smut, horny bots, just check my profile if you want to try them. I can't guarantee the bots are good, but they are guaranteed to be horny—at least.

If you're using JLLM, I use temperature 1.15 with max token 0/unlimited, the result is quite good. Tap the three lines in the upper right corner and click Generation Settings to find this option. Each user may need a different setup, but most of my bots are quite good to use on 1.1-1.3, it all comes down to how you give dialog/response to the bot.

Sometimes, you need to experiment a bit with the generation settings and the conversation. The longer the conversation you say, the better the results usually are. This applies to all bots on JanitorAI. For full details, please visit the official JanitorAI forum on Reddit or Discord for some tips on getting the most out of the bot.
creator: Fhiranooo
